tasks.subject: Task 1: 브릿지 GET /status/diary 엔드포인트
tasks.description:
inbox glob 집계 + OCR trigger 프록시로 DiaryDetail 반환하는 인증 엔드포인트.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/status_diary.ts", "bridge/src/status_diary.test.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gatherDiaryInbox buckets+stale+error-fallback", "gatherDiaryOcr unconfigured/unreachable/ok-parse", "handleDiaryStatus 401/200", "route registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 브릿지 배포 — inbox 마운트 + 일기 env
tasks.description:
term-bridge.container 에 diary inbox 읽기전용 마운트 + trigger env.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container", "bridge/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'diary-inbox\\|DIARY_' bridge/deploy/term-bridge.container", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ro mount no z relabel", "DIARY_INBOX_DIR env", "README rows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 앱 fetchBridgeDetail + DiaryDetail 타입
tasks.description:
브릿지 GET /status/diary 클라이언트 + 타입(브릿지 shape 미러).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/bridgeStatus/statusClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/lib/bridgeStatus/fetchBridgeDetail.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/bridgeStatus/fetchBridgeDetail.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DiaryDetail types exported", "fetchBridgeDetail url+bearer+error-classify"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 앱 DiaryDetailView.svelte
tasks.description:
DiaryDetail → push 신선도 배지 + 폴더별 backlog 막대 + 마지막 OCR 표.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/bridgeStatus/detail/DiaryDetailView.svelte", "app/tests/unit/lib/bridgeStatus/DiaryDetailView.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/bridgeStatus/DiaryDetailView.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stale badge thresholds", "per_folder bars", "ocr unconfigured/ok branches"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: 앱 오버레이 셸 + 레지스트리 + 마운트
tasks.description:
서비스키로 상세 fetch→모달 오버레이 + 키→뷰 레지스트리 + body 온디맨드 마운트.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/bridgeStatus/detail/registry.ts", "app/src/lib/bridgeStatus/detail/BridgeDetailOverlay.svelte", "app/src/lib/bridgeStatus/detail/openBridgeDetail.ts", "app/tests/unit/lib/bridgeStatus/BridgeDetailOverlay.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/bridgeStatus/BridgeDetailOverlay.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registry diary entry", "overlay fetch/loading/error transitions", "z-modal backdrop+esc", "openBridgeDetail single mount+cleanup"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: 대시보드 일기 버튼(클릭→오버레이)
tasks.description:
브릿지:: 노트 제목 뒤 위젯에 상세 버튼(📓 일기) → 클릭 시 openBridgeDetail.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/bridgeNote/bridgeNotePlugin.ts", "app/tests/unit/lib/editor/bridgeNote/bridgeDetailButtons.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/editor/bridgeNote/bridgeDetailButtons.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["detail button on bridge note", "click calls openBridgeDetail('diary')", "no widget on non-bridge note"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 가이드 카드 + 스킬 노트
